title: Define authoritative generated-behavior stratification
lane_outcome: A checked AW contract, schema, inventory, or equivalent durable surface defines primitive, operation IR, generated artifact, target-extension, wrapper, conformance case, and ordinary-test layers, including allowed ownership of executable code and ordinary tests.
purpose_for_parent: Creates the authority model needed before promotion of operation callables, conformance cases, wrapper demotion, and closure inventory.
technical_strategy: Tighten the lane strategy before the first slice starts.
acceptance_boundary: All lane slices have landed, lane proof aggregation is satisfied, and residual work is routed.
proof_strategy: Contract/schema/inventory validation plus tests or checks showing retained hand-owned primitives/tests have owner, proof route, keep reason, and conversion or retirement condition.

evidence: Schema-backed generated_behavior_stratification manifest plus contract-tooling semantic validation, focused tests, structured inventory, ruff, schema-reference docs, lint-workspace, maintainer-surfaces, and full workspace tests after lane deactivation.

residual_lane_work: none; parent #1476 residual work remains routed to #1479, #1480, #1481, #1482, #1483, and #1484.
lane_to_epic_contribution: Defines the authoritative #1476 layer model for primitive, operation IR, generated implementation, target-extension, wrapper/adapter, conformance-case, and retained ordinary-test boundaries, including required owner/proof/keep/retirement fields for retained hand-owned runtime/test boundaries.

closeout_state.summary: Defines the authoritative #1476 layer model for primitive, operation IR, generated implementation, target-extension, wrapper/adapter, conformance-case, and retained ordinary-test boundaries, including required owner/proof/keep/retirement fields for retained hand-owned runtime/test boundaries.
closeout_state.residual_work: none for this lane; parent #1476 residual work remains routed to #1479, #1480, #1481, #1482, #1483, and #1484.

claim_authorization.renderer_rule: Renderers must choose only templates whose required claim class and closure action are authorized here; unsafe prose examples are diagnostics, not the enforcement model.

self_review.question: Does the delivered work satisfy the active human intent?
self_review.reason: The lane outcome is satisfied by the checked stratification contract and proof; the parent epic has separate residual lanes.

continuation.reason: Parent #1476 residual work remains outside this lane.
